title: TOX Pirate Longbird-L hook dowel, plug 8 x 80 mm, hook 6 x 97 mm, 2 pieces, 051701421, white
features: Tetrafix XL all-purpose frame plug and Longbird-L hook screw: secure fastenings in almost all building materials and practical hook screw with handle to secure the function of the dowel
The all-purpose Tetrafix XL frame anchor is suitable for low-lying anchorages in porous concrete and special frame anchor applications thanks to an extended shaft
Ideal for bridging thick, non-bearing layers and anti-twist locks on the dowel neck prevent twisting in the building material
Pirate Longbird-L hook dowel offers a wide range of applications, reliable grip and can be used, for example, to attach bathroom cabinets, picture frames or wall clocks
Box contents: 2x Pirate Longbird-L hook dowels, consisting of 2x all-purpose Tetrafix XL 8 x 80 mm frame plugs and Longbird-L hook screw (6 x 97 mm) with short angle hook, in blister, 051701421
